title: torricelliaceae
intro: The torricelliaceae rank is a family of flowering plants, specifically a group of flowering plant families that are closely related and share similar characteristics. It is a taxonomic rank that groups plants with similar features, such as leaf structure and flower arrangement. The family torricelliaceae consists of approximately 7 genera, native to tropical regions, and is characterized by its unique combination of leaf and flower morphology. This family is part of the larger group of flowering plants, and its members are often found growing in humid, tropical environments.
